Unfortunately, after the first day or two, the affirmations stopped completely. The only notification I now receive is a reminder to “practice,” which isn’t something I’m interested in. It’s frustrating that there doesn’t seem to be a clear way to contact support for assistance, and I haven’t found any helpful information addressing this issue in the help articles. Across several updates now the widgets simply do not work. The customization is clunky and the correct affirmations do not appear. We are not talking about a complicated app here. Loads of other affirmation apps get it right but so far I haven’t found one that also offers customized backgrounds. This looked great but they just can’t get it to work right. The notifications aren’t a reminder to click into the app, the notifications are actually affirmations themselves. That’s one of the major difference I appreciate. 

The widget is a constant reminder as well. I don’t typically buy paid versions of apps but I want to with this one!
